User Story

As a system user

I want to be able to create and manage orders for goods by assigning the applicable parameters by previously entered in the system goods or by entering individual parameters

So that I can manage relationships and tasks easier for customer with purchased goods on price list (nomenclature) or individual sales of goods outside the price list

 

Acceptance criteria:

  1. Creating an order for goods is possible from Good Order's listing page by clicking on a 'Plus' button

  2. Clicking on a Plus button will open goods order's creation page

  3. Check system user permissions to be able to create a new goods order

    1. Permission - Create a Goods Order

    2. Enable Plus button when user has permission

    3. Disable Plus button when user doesn't have permission

  4. Default state of a Goods Order's creation page contains two tabs:

    1. Basic parameters tab

    2. Goods tab

  5. Goods tab will be activated after saving the goods.

  6. 'Issue a proforma invoice' will be active after adding goods in goods order.

  7. 'Issue an invoice' will be activated after creating a proforma invoice only if Applicable interest rate and Payment Term are filled

  8. Basic Parameter tab contains fields:

    1. Order number

      1. Always disabled and empty in creation page

      2. Empty

      3. Text field

      4. Order number should be unique

      5. Is automatically generated by the system after creating order; Orders in the system are automatically numbered with a prefix (ORES) and a unique 10-digit number representing YYMMXXXXXX, where XXXXXX is the serial number of the order for the month. E.g. if first order is generated in 1st May 2023 order number will look like this: 2305000001 

      6. For contracts and orders counter should each month should counter must be reset in each month

        1. Counter in contracts (product contract, service contract) should be the same

          Counter in orders (service order, goods order) should be the same

    2. Order's Creation Date

      1. After saving order, date should be automatically filled based on the time of the order's completion

      2. Date picker

      3. Always disabled

      4. Format: DD.MM.YYYY

      5. Data should be displayed in between 01.01.1990 to 31.12.2090

    3. Order status

      1. Mandatory

        1. Single select dropdown with hardcoded values. In creation only two statuses are visible:

          1. Requested

          2. Confirmed

      2. List of all Goods order statuses (More details are described in edit story):

        1. Requested

        2. Confirmed

        3. Awaiting payment

        4. Paid

        5. In execution

        6. Completed

        7. Refused

    4. Order's status Modify Date

      1. After changing order's status, date should be automatically saved filled baes on the time of the order's editing

        1. If the order status is changed automatically, this modify date should be also updated

        2. Manual entering the date should also be saved.

          1. If this date is added manually, then system shouldn't rewrite it automatically after saving

          2. Date picker

          3. Always enabled

          4. Format: DD.MM.YYYY

          5. If the sub-status is changed even when the main status remain the same, the modify date should be updated with the date of change of the sub-status

    5. Direct Debit

      1. Checkbox

      2. Unselected

      3. Optional

      4. If selected, with priority over Direct Debit in Customer

        1. Bank

          1. Single select dropdown

            1. List of banks are manageable from nomenclature

            2. Display Search Bar if number of items are more than 10 items in dropdown list

            3. While typing search letter list in dropdown should be filtered by search letters

          2. If Direct debit is selected

            1. Mandatory

            2. Enabled

          3. If Direct Debit is not selected

            1. Optional

            2. Enabled

        2. BIC

          1. Always disabled

          2. Text field

          3. If Direct debit is selected

            1. Mandatory

            2. Automatically filled after selecting BANK

          4. If Direct Debit is not selected

            1. Optional

            2. Automatically filled after selecting BANK

        3. Bank Account

          1. Text field

          2. If Direct debit is selected

            1. Mandatory

            2. Enabled

            3. If first 2 symbols of IBAN are BG should cover current validation - BG + 2 symbols (0-9) +4 symbols (A-Z) + 6 symbols (0-9) + 8 symbols ( A-Z 0-9), Example: BG21TBCA12345601234567

            4. If first 2 symbols of IBAN are not BG use next validation - length from 14 to 34 symbols, first 2 symbols A-Z, rest symbols A-Z 0-9, Example: AZ12345678

          3. If Direct Debit is not selected

            1. Optional

            2. Enabled

            3. If first 2 symbols of IBAN are BG should cover current validation - BG + 2 symbols (0-9) +4 symbols (A-Z) + 6 symbols (0-9) + 8 symbols ( A-Z 0-9), Example: BG21TBCA12345601234567

            4. If first 2 symbols of IBAN are not BG use next validation - length from 14 to 34 symbols, first 2 symbols A-Z, rest symbols A-Z 0-9, Example: AZ12345678

    6. Applicable interest rate

      1. Mandatory

      2. Single select dropdown

        1. List of interest rates are retrieved

        2. Only active values will be returned (deleted should be excluded)

        3. Order should be by creation date

        4. Should search in dropdown by name

    7. Prepayment term in calendar days

      1. Optional

      2. Only digits can be added in 1-9999 range

      3. Text field

      4. Default value: 30

    8. Campaign

      1. Optional

      2. Single select dropdown

      3. List is manageable from nomenclature

        1. Active values will be returned from nomenclature

        2. Order should be considered

        3. Display search bar if number of items are more than 10 items in dropdown list

        4. While typing search letter list in dropdown should be filtered by search letters

        5. Display default if returned from nomenclature

    9. Sub-objects

      1. Customer

        1. Mandatory

        2. Customer is added manually

        3. Adding Customer is possible by clicking on a Plus button

        4. When clicking on the “Plus” button modal window should be displayed with fields:

          1. Search Bar - to search a customer and add it to the order

            1. Search bar should have search button

            2. Text field - it is possible to type an ID and search for all customers in the system. It is possible to return a customer which is already connected to the order

            3. Name - filled automatically based on latest customer’s version after clicking on Search button. If version is changed in version’s dropdown name will be updated according the version

            4. Version - by default customer’s latest version is displayed. Will be possible to select customers other version

            5. If customer is unwanted and checkbox ‘Restricted to create order’ is selected should display an error

            6. If customer status is draft should display an error and can’t add to the order

          2. Add Customer to Order - when user finds needed customer and clicks on this button, modal window should be closed, and the customer is added to the order’s creation page

          3. Cancel button - modal window is closed and user stays on the order's creation page

          4. It is possible to remove customer when clicking on remove icon

          5. It is possible to go to the customer’s detailed page when clicking on its name or an arrow

          6. After adding customer to the order, it should be displayed with following format: 

            1. For Private customer display in the list:

              1. Personal number

              2. Name

              3. Middle name (if exists)

              4. Surname

              5. e,g 1234567890 ( ivan ivan ivanov)

            2. For Legal entity display in the list:

              1. UIC

              2. Legal entity name + legal form (short)

              3. e.g 123456789 ( Energopro Georgia)

      2. Communication data for billing

        1. Mandatory

        2. Communication data for billing is added automatically after selecting the customer

        3. Purpose of communication value should be hardcoded in system:

          1. 'Billing' should be hardcoded and shouldn’t be able to remove

          2. The communication data will be filtered by hardcoded value and only relevant communication data will be visible

        4. Communication data should be filtered:

          1. If email and phone number is not added than such communication data should not be visible in the list

        5. It is possible to go to the Communication Data for Billing's detailed page when clicking on its name or an arrow

        6. Added communication data for billing should be displayed with following format:

          1. Manager (Billing)

          2. Commercial director (Billing)

        7. Should be visible all communication purpose. If more than 3 lines - display tooltip

        8. Displayed data can be more than one and in that case it is mandatory to choose one record via the radio button. The newest record should be preselected

      3. Proxy

        1. Optional

          • User should click a Plus button on the sub-object - Proxy

          • Proxy is created manually

        2. Adding Proxy to the order is possible if the customer is already added to the order

          • Plus button should be disabled if the customer is not added and after adding the customer it should become enable

          • If added customer is Private, it is not possible to add more than one proxy

          • If added customer is Legal, it is possible to add more than one proxy

            • On Proxy creation page managers will be listed from this customer

            • If one manager already has proxy added then it shouldn't be able to add another proxy for this manager

        3. All fields should be enabled in Proxy creation Modal window

          • Fields in the left side (Proxy fields) should be Mandatory by default

          • Fields in the right side (Proxy authorized by proxy) should be optional by default

          • So creation proxy will be possible only with Proxy fields filled. (it’s not mandatory to fill fields in the right side)

          • If at least one field is filled in right side (Proxy authorized by proxy) then should be mandatory to fill all fields in order to create

        4. When filling the fields, validations should be checked while writing them

        5. Clicking on Save button will check all validations and display an error with proper field

        6. When clicking on the Plus button modal window should be displayed with fields:

          1. On the left side:

            1. If type is private customer:

              1. Checkbox is hidden

            2. Unrecognised UIC/PN (turn off validation)Optional

              1. Checkbox

              2. Unselected by default

              3. Selecting checkbox stops the validation for UIC/Personal number

            3. Proxy name

              1. Mandatory

              2. Text field

              3. Allowed symbols: A-Z a-z 0-9 D?-D_ D°-Ñ? – @ # $ & * ( ) + - : . , ‘ € â?? = space. Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed

              4. Length: 1-512 characters

        7. UIC/Personal number/Personal number of a foreigner

          1. Mandatory

          2. Text field

          3. Allowed symbols: 0-9 A-Z

          4. Length: 1-31 characters

          5. When Unrecognised UIC/PN (turn off validation) is not selected:

            1. Allowed symbols: 0-9

            2. Length: 9,10, 13 symbols

            3. 9 and 13 digits are enabled for legal customer's UIC

            4. 10 digits are required for private customer

            5. Value should be checked by the algorithm: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1lILNbnD0RK6MV_Ugf48KwX12BqsDvmIZ/edit#heading=h.gjdgxs

            6. No need for APIS api check

          6. When Unrecognised UIC/PN (turn off validation) is selected

            1. Allowed symbols: 0-9 A-Z

            2. Length: min - 1, max - 32

            3. For Unrecognised UIC/PN (turn off validation) it is not possible to determine who belongs added value - is it UIC or personal number

        8. Email

          1. Optional if Proxy authorized by proxy is added

          2. Text field

          3. Allowed symbols: A-Z a-z 0-9 ! # $ % &' * + - / = ? ^ _ ` | { } ~ . Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed

          4. Standard email validation

          5. Length: 1-512 characters

        9. Mobile phone

          1. Optional if Proxy authorized by proxy is added

          2. Text field

          3. Allowed symbols: 0-9 – + - *

          4. Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed

          5. Length: 1-32 characters

        10. Power of Attorney Number

          1. Mandatory

          2. Text field

          3. Allowed symbols: 0-9 A-Z a-z D?-D_ D°-Ñ? – -

          4. Length: 1-32 characters

        11. Date

          1. Mandatory

          2. Date picker

          3. Format: MM.DD.YYYY

          4. Date < Valid till

          5. Date <= current date

          6. Date should be displayed between 01.01.1990 to 31.12.2090

        12. Valid till

          1. Optional

          2. Date picker

          3. Format: DD.MM.YYYY

          4. Date should be displayed between 01.01.1990 to 31.12 2090

          5. Valid till > Date

          6. Valid till > current date

        13. Notary Public

          1. Mandatory

          2. Text field

          3. Allowed symbols: A-Z a-z 0-9 D?-D_ D°-Ñ? – @ # $ & * ( ) + - : . , ‘ € â?? = space
            Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed

          4. Length: 1-512 characters

        14. Registration number

          1. Optional

          2. Text field

          3. Allowed symbols: 0-9 A-Z a-z D?-D_ D°-Ñ? – -

          4. Length: 1-32 characters

        15. Area of Operation

          1. Mandatory

          2. Text field

          3. Allowed symbols: A-Z a-z 0-9 D?-D_ D°-Ñ? – @ # $ & * ( ) + - : . , ‘ € â?? = space Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed

          4. Length: 1-512 characters

        16. Managers

          1. If type is legal customer

            1. Checkbox

            2. Mandatory to select at least one manager

            3. It is possible to select ALL checkboxes and it will check all listed managers

            4. List of managers will be displayed in following format: name, middle name, surname and position in brackets. E.g. IVAN PETROV GOSPODINOV (Manager)

        17. On the left side:

          Unrecognised UIC/PN (turn off validation)

          1. Optional

          2. Checkbox

          3. Unselected by default

          4. Selecting checkbox changes validation for UIC/Personal number

        18. Proxy name

          1. Mandatory

          2. Text field

          3. Allowed symbols: A-Z a-z 0-9 D?-D_ D°-Ñ? – @ # $ & * ( ) + - : . , ‘ € â?? = space. Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed

          4. Length: 1-512 characters

        19. UIC/Personal number/Personal number of a foreigner

          1. Mandatory

          2. Text field

          3. Allowed symbols: 0-9 A-Z

          4. Length: 1-32 characters

          5. When Unrecognised UIC/PN (turn off validation) is not selected:

            1. Allowed symbols: 0-9

            2. Length: 9,10, 13 symbols

            3. 9 and 13 digits are enabled for legal customer's UIC

            4. 10 digits are required for private customer

            5. Value should be checked by the algorithm: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1lILNbnD0RK6MV_Ugf48KwX12BqsDvmIZ/edit#heading=h.gjdgxs

            6. No need for APIS api check

          6. When Unrecognised UIC/PN (turn off validation) is selected

            1. Allowed symbols: 0-9 A-Z

            2. Length: min - 1, max - 32

            3. For Unrecognised UIC/PN (turn off validation) it is not possible to determine who belongs added value - is it UIC or personal number

        20. Email

          1. Mandatory

            1. Optional if Proxy authorized by proxy is added

          2. Text field

          3. Allowed symbols: A-Z a-z 0-9 ! # $ % &' * + - / = ? ^ _ ` | { } ~ . @ Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed

          4. Standard email validation

          5. Length: 1-512 characters

        21. Mobile phone

          1. Mandatory

            1. Optional if Proxy authorized by proxy is added

          2. Text field

          3. Allowed symbols: 0-9 – + - *

          4. Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed

          5. Length: 1-32 characters

        22. Power of Attorney Number

          1. Mandatory

          2. Text field

          3. Allowed symbols: 0-9 A-Z a-z D?-D_ D°-Ñ? – -

          4. Length: 1-32 characters

        23. Date

          1. Mandatory

          2. Date picker

          3. Format: MM.DD.YYYY

          4. Date < Valid till

          5. Date <= current date

          6. Date should be displayed between 01.01.1990 to 31.12.2090

        24. Valid till

          1. Optional

          2. Date picker

          3. Format: DD.MM.YYYY

          4. Date should be displayed between 01.01.1990 to 31.12 2090

          5. Valid till > Date

          6. Valid till > current date

        25. Notary Public

          1. Mandatory

          2. Text field

          3. Allowed symbols: A-Z a-z 0-9 D?-D_ D°-Ñ? – @ # $ & * ( ) + - : . , ‘ € â?? = space. Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed

          4. Length: 1-512 characters

        26. Registration number

          1. Optional

          2. Text field

          3. Allowed symbols: 0-9 A-Z a-z D?-D_ D°-Ñ? – -

          4. Length: 1-32 characters

        27. Area of Operation

          1. Mandatory

          2. Text field

          3. Allowed symbols: A-Z a-z 0-9 D?-D_ D°-Ñ? – @ # $ & * ( ) + - : . , ‘ € â?? = space Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed

          4. Length: 1-512 character

        28. Managers

          1. If selected customer’s type is legal customer

            1. Checkbox

            2. Mandatory to select at least one manager

            3. It is possible to select ALL checkbox and it will check all listed managers

            4. List of managers will be displayed in following format: name, middle name, surname and position in brackets e.g. IVAN PETROV GOSPODINOV (Manager)z

          2. If selected customer’s type is private customer:

            1. Manager's checkbox is hidden

         

        On the right side Proxy authorized by proxy:

        1. Unrecognised UIC/PN (turn off validation)

          1. Optional

          2. Checkbox

          3. Unselected by default

          4. Selecting checkbox changes the validation for Personal Number

        2. Proxy authorized by proxy

          1. Optional

            1. Mandatory if at least one field is filled in right side

          2. Text field

          3. Allowed symbols: A-Z a-z 0-9 D?-D_ D°-Ñ? – @ # $ & * ( ) + - : . , ‘ € â?? = space Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed

          4. Length: 1-512 characters

        3. Personal number/Personal number of a foreigner

          1. Optional

            1. Mandatory if at least one field is filled in right side

          2. When Unrecognised UIC/PN (turn off validation) is not selected:

            1. Allowed symbols: 0-9

            2. Length: 10 characters

            3. Validation: Algorithm for checking personal number - https://docs.google.com/document/d/1lILNbnD0RK6MV_Ugf48KwX12BqsDvmIZ/edit#heading=h.gjdgxs

          3. When /Person is selected:

            1. Allowed symbols: 0-9 A-Z

            2. Length: 12 symbols

            3. Format: YYYYMMDDCCNN (Only to check first 8 characters should be valid date, last 4 characters are letters or digits)

        4. Email

          1. Optional

            1. Mandatory if at least one field is filled in right side

          2. Text field

          3. Allowed symbols: A-Z a-z 0-9 ! # $ % &' * + - / = ? ^ _ ` | { } ~ . @
            Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed

          4. Standard email validation

          5. Length: 1-512 characters

        5. Mobile phone

          1. Optional

            1. Mandatory if at least one field is filled in right side

          2. Text field

          3. Allowed symbols: 0-9 – + - *

          4. Length: 1-32 characters

        6. Power of Attorney number

          1. Optional

            1. Mandatory if at least one field is filled in right side

          2. Text field

          3. Allowed symbols: 0-9 A-Z a-z D?-D_ D°-Ñ? – -

          4. Length: 1-32 characters

        7. Date

          1. Optional

            1. Mandatory if at least one field is filled in right side

          2. Date picker

          3. Format: MM.DD.YYYY

          4. Date < Valid till

          5. Date <= current date

          6. Date should be displayed between 01.01.1990 to 31.12.2090

        8. Valid till

          1. Optional

          2. Date picker

          3. Format: MM.DD.YYYY

          4. Date should be displayed between 01.01.1990 to 31.12.2090

          5. Valid till > Date

          6. Valid till > current date

        9. Notary Public

          1. Optional

            1. Mandatory if at least one field is filled in right side

          2. Text field

          3. Allowed symbols: A-Z a-z 0-9 D?-D_ D°-Ñ? – @ # $ & * ( ) + - : . , ‘ € â?? = space Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed

          4. Length: 1-512 characters

        10. Registration number

          1. Optional

          2. Text field

          3. Allowed symbols: 0-9 A-Z a-z D?-D_ D°-Ñ? – -

          4. Length: 1-32 characters

        11. Are of operation

          1. Optional

            1. Mandatory if at least one field is filled in right side

          2. Text field

          3. Allowed symbols: A-Z a-z 0-9 D?-D_ D°-Ñ? – @ # $ & * ( ) + - : . , ‘ € â?? = space Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed

          4. Length: 1-512 character

        12. Files

          1. By clicking on a Plus button it is possible to upload already signed documents

          2. Optional

          3. When user clicks on a Plus button, he/she have possibility to upload a file from the computer

          4. Display file name after uploading. Clicking on it will download file

          5. Allowed file formats: pdf, jpg, .jpeg, .png, .bmp

          6. Max file size: 50mb

          7. It is possible to upload more than one document

        13. Clicking on Save button will check all the validation

          • Clicking on Save button will check all the validation

            1. If frontend validations are successful, Modal window should be closed and added proxy should be listed to order creation page

            2. List will be sorted by creation date; Newly added proxy will be recorded as the last item.

            3. Format to display:

              1. if proxy is added for more than one manager should display proxy's name and managers in brackets

                1. e.g. Tina (tina korinteli (Manager1), tina korinteli (manager 2))

              2. If proxy has its authorized proxy added to display authorized proxy and proxy separated by dash and managers in brackets

                1. Tina - Tina2 (tina korinteli (Manager1), tina korinteli (manager 2))

            4. If an error happens display with proper field

            5. If there is more than one error, system should display all the error in interface

            6. Actual proxy Create/Editing/Removing actions will be saved in database only when user confirms on main "Create Order" button on the bottom of the page, until that stage all data are managed only on frontend side

            7. Clicking on Cancel button or X button will close the modal window

        14. Edit

          • Proxy's edit process can be started only from editing order process (it is not possible to edit Proxy without editing order)

          • All fields are editable

          • Clicking on OK button in pop-up will check all validations (only frontend side validation)

          • If validations are fine, Modal window will be closed and actual saving will happen on order "Edit" button click

            • If some fields in Proxy are edited and try to close the main object without saving, the warning message should appear

            • If a new version is created for the order a new proxy will be created and linked to the new version and the old one will not be effected

        15. Preview

          • Proxy preview can be opened from order creation page

          • On the Preview mode all field are disabled and can't be edited

          • Edit/Remove icon will be listed in order creation/edit page, not in Proxy preview

        16. Delete

          • Proxy delete process can be started only from editing order process

            • Delete icon will be active on order "Edit" mode

          • By clicking on a delete icon system should display a warning message: "Are you sure you want to delete Proxy?"

            • Yes - Proxy will be deleted after confirming changes to order

            • Cancel - popup is closed and is not deleted

          • Warning message should be managed visa system messages configuration

      4. Payment term

        1. Optional

        2. Payment term is added manually by clicking on the Plus button

        3. Added payment term should have predefined parameters (value must be added, and value from/to shouldn’t be filled)

        4. It is not possible to add more than one payment term to the goods order

        5. It is possible to delete the added payment term from the goods order by clicking on the remove icon

        6. It is possible to view the added payment term by clicking on an arrow

        7. Fields Validations for payment term:

          1. Type

            1. Mandatory

            2. Single Select Dropdown

            3. No need to select default value in dropdown

            4. Hardcoded values:

              1. Working Days (D D°D±D_Ñ?D½D, D'D½D,)

              2. Calendar Days (D?D°D»DµD½D'D°Ñ?D½D, D'D½D,)

              3. Certain day of the month (D¢D_Ñ?D½D° D'D°Ñ?D°)

          2. Value

            1. Mandatory

            2. Text field

            3. Only digits can be added

              1. If Type is set to working days or calendar date

                1. Number should be between 0-9999

                2. Length: max 4 characters

                3. Negative values and zero are not allowed can’t be added

                4. Display warning message if doesn’t match validation

              2. If Type is set to Certain day of the month option

                1. Number should be between 1-31

                2. Length: max 4 characters

                3. Negative values and zero are not allowed can’t be added

                4. Display warning message if doesn’t match validation

          3. Value from

            1. Empty

            2. Disabled

          4. Value to

            1. Empty

            2. Disabled

          5. Calendar

            1. Mandatory

            2. Single select dropdown

              1. List is manageable from nomenclature

                1. Active values will be returned from nomenclature

                2. Order should be considered

                3. Display Search Bar if number of items are more than 10 items in dropdown list

                4. While typing search letter list in dropdown should be filtered by search letters

                5. Display default if returned from nomenclature

          6. Exclude for due date

            1. Optional

            2. If Type is selected Working days, the checkboxes „Weekends“ and „Holidays“ should be disabled and empty

            3. Checkboxes

              1. Weekends – will replace weekends (depending selected Calendar)

              2. Holidays – will replace holidays (depending selected Calendar)

            4. If select checkbox than invoice payment due day will be replaced with previous or next working day (depending selected in ‘Change due date to’ ratio buttons))

          7. Change due date to

            1. Optional

            2. When checkboxes Weekends or Holidays are not selected, the radio buttons “Change due date to” should also be disabled and empty

            3. Radio Button

            4. Hardcoded values:

              1. Previous working day

              2. Next working day (preselected)

      5. No interest on overdue debts

        1. Unchecked by default

        2. If selected overdue debts will not be calculated in payment process

      6. Activities

        1. Empty in order creation, only in order editing/preview mode can be added new activity to order

      7. Tasks

        1. Empty in order creation, only in order editing/preview mode can be added new task to order

      8. Employee

        1. Disabled

        2. The user which is logged in the system is added automatically by the system as an Employee

        3. It is not possible to add more than one employee to the order

        4. Not clickable

      9. Related Contracts/Orders

        1. Adding related contracts/orders to the goods order is optional

        2. Related contracts/orders are added manually

          1. Adding related contracts/orders is possible by clicking on a plus button

          2. After clicking on a Plus button, modal window should open

        3. Modal window of adding related contracts/orders to contract contains fields:

          1. Radio button

            1. With two possible options: Contract and Order

            2. By default, Contract is selected, so when user tried to search for contract by contract number, search should run only in product and service contracts

            3. If Order is selected, then search should run in service and goods order

          2. Search bar - to search order by order number and add it to the goods order

            1. Search bar should have search button

            2. Search should be able in all service/goods orders in the system

            3. System should not display deleted orders

Goods tab - 2nd tab

User Story

 

As a system user

I want to be able to create and manage orders for goods by assigning the applicable parameters by previously entered in the system goods or by entering individual parameters

So that I can manage relationships and tasks easier for customer with purchased goods on price list (nomenclature) or individual sales of goods outside the price list

 

Acceptance criteria:

  1. Creating an order for goods is possible from Good Order's listing page by clicking on a 'Plus' button

  2. Clicking on a Plus button will open goods order's creation page

  3. Check system user permissions to be able to create a new goods order

    1. Permission - Create a Goods Order

    2. Enable Plus button when user has permission

    3. Disable Plus button when user doesn't have permission

  4. Default state of a Goods Order's creation page contains two tabs:

    1. Basic parameters tab

    2. Goods tab

  5. Goods tab will be activated after saving the goods.

  6. 'Issue a proforma invoice' will be active after adding goods in goods order.

  7. 'Issue an invoice' will be activated after creating a proforma invoice only if Applicable interest rate and Payment Term are filled

  8. Goods tab contains fields:

    1. Number of income account

      1. Optional

        1. Mandatory if added already existing goods without filed Number of income account

      2. Text field

      3. All symbols are allowed. Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed

      4. Length: 1-32 characters

      5. Enabled

      6. Value will be used when closing accounting period in export

    2. Cost center / Controlling order

      1. Optional

        1. Mandatory if added already existing goods without filed Number of income account

      2. Text field

      3. All symbols are allowed. Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed

      4. Length: 1-32 characters

      5. Enabled

      6. Value will be used when closing account period in export

    3. VAT rate

      1. Mandatory

      2. Single select dropdown

      3. List is manageable from nomenclature

        1. Active values will be returned from nomenclature

        2. The default value selected in dropdown should be hardcoded 'Global VAT rate'

          1. If Global VAT rate is not set in nomenclature, then default will not be selected

          2. Selecting 'Global VAT rate' optional means always to use Global VAT rate which is valid for certain date. (If Global VAT rate is changed in nomenclatures and other nomenclature item becomes valid after certain date, changes will automatically be reflected)

          3. Selecting specific value from dropdown list (not hardcoded - Global VAT rate option) it means that selected value should always be used

          4. E.g. nomenclature list contains values with following order:

            1. VAT RATE 1 (Global VAT Rate checkbox is selected with end date 17^th^ February

            2. VAT RATE 2 (Global VAT Rate checkbox is selected with start date –18th February

            3. VAT RATE 3

            4. VAT RATE 4

          5. In dropdown user should see:

            1. Global VAT Rate (By default selected)

            2. VAT RATE 1

            3. VAT RATE 2

            4. VAT RATE 3

            5. VAT RATE 4

          6. If product is connected to – Global VAT rate, than on 18^th^ February in calculations value taken from VAT RATE 2 will be used

          7. If product is connected to VAT RATE 1, than on 18^th^ February goods will still use VAT RATE 1 value in calculations.

    4. Goods search

      1. Optional button

      2. To be able to search in single select dropdown already registered goods by its name or ID

      3. It is possible to select good’s version. By default, the latest version is selected in the dropdown

        1. Needed information should be displayed form the respective version

      4. System should generate order according to selected goods

      5. To be able to select more than one goods

      6. Selected goods will be displayed in disabled mode in goods table, so will not be possible to change it from goods order page

        1. Quantity - by default should be empty and can be changed

      7. Added goods will be recorded as a last record in table

    5. Import

      1. To be able to import goods to create goods order object. Imported goods first will be saved in DB and then displayed in goods order creation page as the last records.

      2. Will be able to edit record in the table

        1. If in goods order level is not defined 'number of income account' and cons center / controlling order, then in imported goods order should contain them. If not display error

      3. Import Modal window will be opened from goods order page.

      4. On import's Modal window user should see

        1. Choose file button

        2. Download template

      5. Import and Save button

        1. System should check is a valid file is attached

          1. If no, then display an error

        2. To be able to save the imported data to the DB

      6. Cancel button

        1. After clicking on the Cancel button, modal window is closed and the user stays on the Edit page

        2. Even if file is attached and user clicks on Cancel, the data will not be imported

    6. Goods table

      1. To display the first row with Plus button

      2. To display Delete icon when second row is added

      3. It is possible to add maximum 1000 Goods in the table

      4. Fields added in goods table:

        1. Name

          1. Mandatory

          2. Text field

          3. All symbols are allowed. Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed

          4. Length: 1-1024 characters

        2. Code for connection with other system

          1. Optional

          2. Text field

          3. All symbols are allowed. Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed

          4. Length: 1-256 characters

          5. Enabled

        3. Goods unit

          1. Mandatory

          2. Single select dropdown

          3. List is manageable from nomenclature

            1. Active values will be returned from nomenclature

            2. Order should be considered

            3. Display Search Bar if number of items are more than 10 items in dropdown list

            4. While typing search letter, list in dropdown should be filtered by search letters

            5. Display default if returned from nomenclature

        4. Quantity

          1. Mandatory

          2. Text field

          3. Only digits can be added in 1-9999 range

        5. Price

          1. Mandatory

          2. Text field

          3. Validation: valid decimal number with 2 digits after the decimal point, negative values and zero are not allowed

          4. Length: 15 symbols, 0.01-999999999999.99

        6. Currency

          1. Single select dropdown

          2. List is manageable from nomenclature

            1. Active values will be returned from nomenclature

            2. Order should be considered

            3. Display default if returned from nomenclature

        7. Number of incoming account

          1. Optional

            1. Mandatory if on goods order lever is not defined

          2. Text field

          3. All symbols are allowed. Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed

          4. Length: 1-32 characters

          5. Enabled

        8. Cost center / Controlling order

          1. Optional

            1. Mandatory if on goods order level is not defined

          2. Text field

          3. All symbols are allowed. Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed

          4. Length: 1-32 characters

          5. Enabled

    7. Import

      1. To be able to import goods to create goods order object. Imported goods first will be saved in DB and then displayed in goods order creation page as the last records.

      2. Will be able to edit record in the table

        1. If in goods order level is not defined 'number of income account' and cons center / controlling order, then in imported goods order should contain them. If not display error

      3. Import Modal window will be opened from goods order page.

      4. On import's Modal window user should see

        1. Choose file button

        2. Download template

      5. Import and Save button

        1. System should check is a valid file is attached

          1. If no, then display an error

        2. To be able to save the imported data to the DB

      6. Cancel button

        1. After clicking on the Cancel button, modal window is closed and the user stays on the Edit page

        2. Even if file is attached and user clicks on Cancel, the data will not be imported

  9. Table should have pagination

  10. After leaving the field in each row in the table the system should check the validations and if successful should save the record in DB automatically

 

  • Create button

    • Clicking on create button will check frontend validation and if it is successful creation of the goods order will be sent to the backend

      • If the frontend validations are not successful system should display an error message

    • If frontend validations are successful system should check all validation in backend

    • To check if customer is unwanted and 'Restricted to create an order' is selected

      • If it is - return error

      • If all the steps are successful system should create record in DB

      • Audit Log record should be created

      • After creating the goods order page should be refreshed to the preview page

  • Cancel button

    • After clicking on the Cancel button warning pop-up message comes out: 'Your changes are not saved, are you sure you want to cancel?' Yes/No

      • Yes - will close pop-up and the user is returned to the listing page

      • No - will close pop-up and the user stays on the current page

      • Warning message should be managed via system settings

  • Cancel Invoice button

    • Button should be clickable when real pro-forma/real invoice exists.

    • When user clicks Cancel invoice > system should show pop-up for selecting Template in Dropdown (only one)

      • Template listing will be filtered by Purpose: Invoice Cancelation

    • Cancelling pro-forma does not start canceling process

User Story

As a system user

I want to be able to create and manage orders for goods by assigning the applicable parameters by previously entered in the system goods or by entering individual parameters

So that I can manage relationships and tasks easier for customer with purchased goods on price list (nomenclature) or individual sales of goods outside the price list

 

Acceptance criteria:

  1. Creating an order for goods is possible from Good Order's listing page by clicking on a 'Plus' button

  2. Clicking on a Plus button will open goods order's creation page

  3. Check system user permissions to be able to create a new goods order

    1. Permission - Create a Goods Order

    2. Enable Plus button when user has permission

    3. Disable Plus button when user doesn't have permission

  4. Default state of a Goods Order's creation page contains two tabs:

    1. Basic parameters tab

    2. Goods tab

  5. Goods tab will be activated after saving the goods.

  6. 'Issue a proforma invoice' will be active after adding goods in goods order.

  7. 'Issue an invoice' will be activated after creating a proforma invoice only if Applicable interest rate and Payment Term are filled

  8. Basic Parameter tab contains fields:

    1. Order number

      1. Always disabled and empty in creation page

      2. Empty

      3. Text field

      4. Order number should be unique

      5. Is automatically generated by the system after creating order; Orders in the system are automatically numbered with a prefix (ORES) and a unique 10-digit number representing YYMMXXXXXX, where XXXXXX is the serial number of the order for the month. E.g. if first order is generated in 1st May 2023 order number will look like this: 2305000001 

      6. For contracts and orders counter should each month should counter must be reset in each month

        1. Counter in contracts (product contract, service contract) should be the same

          Counter in orders (service order, goods order) should be the same

    2. Order's Creation Date

      1. After saving order, date should be automatically filled based on the time of the order's completion

      2. Date picker

      3. Always disabled

      4. Format: DD.MM.YYYY

      5. Data should be displayed in between 01.01.1990 to 31.12.2090

    3. Order status

      1. Mandatory

        1. Single select dropdown with hardcoded values. In creation only two statuses are visible:

          1. Requested

          2. Confirmed

      2. List of all Goods order statuses (More details are described in edit story):

        1. Requested

        2. Confirmed

        3. Awaiting payment

        4. Paid

        5. In execution

        6. Completed

        7. Refused

    4. Order's status Modify Date

      1. After changing order's status, date should be automatically saved filled baes on the time of the order's editing

        1. If the order status is changed automatically, this modify date should be also updated

        2. Manual entering the date should also be saved.

          1. If this date is added manually, then system shouldn't rewrite it automatically after saving

          2. Date picker

          3. Always enabled

          4. Format: DD.MM.YYYY

          5. If the sub-status is changed even when the main status remain the same, the modify date should be updated with the date of change of the sub-status

    5. Direct Debit

      1. Checkbox

      2. Unselected

      3. Optional

      4. If selected, with priority over Direct Debit in Customer

        1. Bank

          1. Single select dropdown

            1. List of banks are manageable from nomenclature

            2. Display Search Bar if number of items are more than 10 items in dropdown list

            3. While typing search letter list in dropdown should be filtered by search letters

          2. If Direct debit is selected

            1. Mandatory

            2. Enabled

          3. If Direct Debit is not selected

            1. Optional

            2. Enabled

        2. BIC

          1. Always disabled

          2. Text field

          3. If Direct debit is selected

            1. Mandatory

            2. Automatically filled after selecting BANK

          4. If Direct Debit is not selected

            1. Optional

            2. Automatically filled after selecting BANK

        3. Bank Account

          1. Text field

          2. If Direct debit is selected

            1. Mandatory

            2. Enabled

            3. If first 2 symbols of IBAN are BG should cover current validation - BG + 2 symbols (0-9) +4 symbols (A-Z) + 6 symbols (0-9) + 8 symbols ( A-Z 0-9), Example: BG21TBCA12345601234567

            4. If first 2 symbols of IBAN are not BG use next validation - length from 14 to 34 symbols, first 2 symbols A-Z, rest symbols A-Z 0-9, Example: AZ12345678

          3. If Direct Debit is not selected

            1. Optional

            2. Enabled

            3. If first 2 symbols of IBAN are BG should cover current validation - BG + 2 symbols (0-9) +4 symbols (A-Z) + 6 symbols (0-9) + 8 symbols ( A-Z 0-9), Example: BG21TBCA12345601234567

            4. If first 2 symbols of IBAN are not BG use next validation - length from 14 to 34 symbols, first 2 symbols A-Z, rest symbols A-Z 0-9, Example: AZ12345678

    6. Applicable interest rate

      1. Mandatory

      2. Single select dropdown

        1. List of interest rates are retrieved

        2. Only active values will be returned (deleted should be excluded)

        3. Order should be by creation date

        4. Should search in dropdown by name

    7. Prepayment term in calendar days

      1. Optional

      2. Only digits can be added in 1-9999 range

      3. Text field

      4. Default value: 30

    8. Campaign

      1. Optional

      2. Single select dropdown

      3. List is manageable from nomenclature

        1. Active values will be returned from nomenclature

        2. Order should be considered

        3. Display search bar if number of items are more than 10 items in dropdown list

        4. While typing search letter list in dropdown should be filtered by search letters

        5. Display default if returned from nomenclature

    9. Sub-objects

      1. Customer

        1. Mandatory

        2. Customer is added manually

        3. Adding Customer is possible by clicking on a Plus button

        4. When clicking on the “Plus” button modal window should be displayed with fields:

          1. Search Bar - to search a customer and add it to the order

            1. Search bar should have search button

            2. Text field - it is possible to type an ID and search for all customers in the system. It is possible to return a customer which is already connected to the order

            3. Name - filled automatically based on latest customer’s version after clicking on Search button. If version is changed in version’s dropdown name will be updated according the version

            4. Version - by default customer’s latest version is displayed. Will be possible to select customers other version

            5. If customer is unwanted and checkbox ‘Restricted to create order’ is selected should display an error

            6. If customer status is draft should display an error and can’t add to the order

          2. Add Customer to Order - when user finds needed customer and clicks on this button, modal window should be closed, and the customer is added to the order’s creation page

          3. Cancel button - modal window is closed and user stays on the order's creation page

          4. It is possible to remove customer when clicking on remove icon

          5. It is possible to go to the customer’s detailed page when clicking on its name or an arrow

          6. After adding customer to the order, it should be displayed with following format: 

            1. For Private customer display in the list:

              1. Personal number

              2. Name

              3. Middle name (if exists)

              4. Surname

              5. e,g 1234567890 ( ivan ivan ivanov)

            2. For Legal entity display in the list:

              1. UIC

              2. Legal entity name + legal form (short)

              3. e.g 123456789 ( Energopro Georgia)

      2. Communication data for billing

        1. Mandatory

        2. Communication data for billing is added automatically after selecting the customer

        3. Purpose of communication value should be hardcoded in system:

          1. 'Billing' should be hardcoded and shouldn’t be able to remove

          2. The communication data will be filtered by hardcoded value and only relevant communication data will be visible

        4. Communication data should be filtered:

          1. If email and phone number is not added than such communication data should not be visible in the list

        5. It is possible to go to the Communication Data for Billing's detailed page when clicking on its name or an arrow

        6. Added communication data for billing should be displayed with following format:

          1. Manager (Billing)

          2. Commercial director (Billing)

        7. Should be visible all communication purpose. If more than 3 lines - display tooltip

        8. Displayed data can be more than one and in that case it is mandatory to choose one record via the radio button. The newest record should be preselected

      3. Proxy

        1. Optional

          • User should click a Plus button on the sub-object - Proxy

          • Proxy is created manually

        2. Adding Proxy to the order is possible if the customer is already added to the order

          • Plus button should be disabled if the customer is not added and after adding the customer it should become enable

          • If added customer is Private, it is not possible to add more than one proxy

          • If added customer is Legal, it is possible to add more than one proxy

            • On Proxy creation page managers will be listed from this customer

            • If one manager already has proxy added then it shouldn't be able to add another proxy for this manager

        3. All fields should be enabled in Proxy creation Modal window

          • Fields in the left side (Proxy fields) should be Mandatory by default

          • Fields in the right side (Proxy authorized by proxy) should be optional by default

          • So creation proxy will be possible only with Proxy fields filled. (it’s not mandatory to fill fields in the right side)

          • If at least one field is filled in right side (Proxy authorized by proxy) then should be mandatory to fill all fields in order to create

        4. When filling the fields, validations should be checked while writing them

        5. Clicking on Save button will check all validations and display an error with proper field

        6. When clicking on the Plus button modal window should be displayed with fields:

          1. On the left side:

            1. If type is private customer:

              1. Checkbox is hidden

            2. Unrecognised UIC/PN (turn off validation)Optional

              1. Checkbox

              2. Unselected by default

              3. Selecting checkbox stops the validation for UIC/Personal number

            3. Proxy name

              1. Mandatory

              2. Text field

              3. Allowed symbols: A-Z a-z 0-9 D?-D_ D°-Ñ? – @ # $ & * ( ) + - : . , ‘ € â?? = space. Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed

              4. Length: 1-512 characters

        7. UIC/Personal number/Personal number of a foreigner

          1. Mandatory

          2. Text field

          3. Allowed symbols: 0-9 A-Z

          4. Length: 1-31 characters

          5. When Unrecognised UIC/PN (turn off validation) is not selected:

            1. Allowed symbols: 0-9

            2. Length: 9,10, 13 symbols

            3. 9 and 13 digits are enabled for legal customer's UIC

            4. 10 digits are required for private customer

            5. Value should be checked by the algorithm: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1lILNbnD0RK6MV_Ugf48KwX12BqsDvmIZ/edit#heading=h.gjdgxs

Goods tab - 2nd tab

User Story

 

As a system user

I want to be able to create and manage orders for goods by assigning the applicable parameters by previously entered in the system goods or by entering individual parameters

So that I can manage relationships and tasks easier for customer with purchased goods on price list (nomenclature) or individual sales of goods outside the price list

 

Acceptance criteria:

  1. Creating an order for goods is possible from Good Order's listing page by clicking on a 'Plus' button

  2. Clicking on a Plus button will open goods order's creation page

  3. Check system user permissions to be able to create a new goods order

    1. Permission - Create a Goods Order

    2. Enable Plus button when user has permission

    3. Disable Plus button when user doesn't have permission

  4. Default state of a Goods Order's creation page contains two tabs:

    1. Basic parameters tab

    2. Goods tab

  5. Goods tab will be activated after saving the goods.

  6. 'Issue a proforma invoice' will be active after adding goods in goods order.

  7. 'Issue an invoice' will be activated after creating a proforma invoice only if Applicable interest rate and Payment Term are filled

  8. Goods tab contains fields:

    1. Number of income account

      1. Optional

        1. Mandatory if added already existing goods without filed Number of income account

      2. Text field

      3. All symbols are allowed. Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed

      4. Length: 1-32 characters

      5. Enabled

      6. Value will be used when closing accounting period in export

    2. Cost center / Controlling order

      1. Optional

        1. Mandatory if added already existing goods without filed Number of income account

      2. Text field

      3. All symbols are allowed. Should not be only spaces. Spaces at the beginning and at the end should be trimmed

      4. Length: 1-32 characters

      5. Enabled

      6. Value will be used when closing account period in export

    3. VAT rate

      1. Mandatory

      2. Single select dropdown

      3. List is manageable from nomenclature

        1. Active values will be returned from nomenclature

          4. E.g. nomenclature list contains values with following order:
